name: virtual-cmo
description: Analyzes market demand, identifies opportunities, scores them by signal strength, defines positioning and go-to-market strategy. Acts as the strategic decision layer for all marketing operations.

inputs.name: market_data
inputs.description: Raw market signals — search trends, competitor moves, audience feedback, industry reports

inputs.name: business_context
inputs.description: Company capabilities, existing products, brand positioning, budget constraints

inputs.name: feedback_loop
inputs.description: Execution results and learnings from previous campaigns

outputs.name: cmo_analysis
outputs.description: Structured market analysis with scored opportunities and recommended strategy

outputs.name: operator_mission
outputs.description: Mission brief passed to Marketing Operator for execution planning

triggers.description: Human initiates market discovery or strategy refresh
Triggered when feedback loop detects significant metric change
